message.content:
@startuml
actor User
participant UI as "UI" #LightBlue2
control Application as "Application" #LightBlue2
database Database as "Database" #LightBlue2

User -> UI : go to Tables page
activate UI
    UI -> Application : Dump Tables
        activate Application
            Application -> Database : Dump Tables
                activate Database
                    Database --> Application : Tables
                deactivate Database
            Application --> UI : Tables
        deactivate Application
    
    note over UI\nright of 10px \nleft of -56px 
      Click \"Delete\" on a Class  
    endnote 
    
    UI <- User : DeleteClass(ClassID)
    
    UI -> Application : Success
        activate Application
        
        Application <---> Database : Update table 
        
        Application <-> UI : Refresh Table View   
        
    	deactivate Application
     
deactivate UI 

@enduml
